---
title: "Conferences"
---

## Posters
### NetSci 2026 
**How stubborn anticonformists drive social hysteresis - quenched anticonformity in the multistate *q*-voter model on networks**
<iframe src="content/posters/netsci-2026.pdf" style="height: 680px; width: 960px;scrolling=yes"></iframe> 

### IC2S2 2025
**Depolarizing Power of Anticonformity**
<iframe src="content/posters/ic2s2-2025.pdf" style="height: 680px; width: 960px;scrolling=yes"></iframe>
